package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_over_map_for_deterministic_first: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag map iteration used to pick a deterministic first value, causing unstable work and extra sorting later.
type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirst(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "collection": 3, "iteration": 4, "range": 5, "over": 6}
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    collection_negative_2 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["collection"] + len(input)
    _ = collection_negative_2
    for iteration_negative_3Index, item := range items { perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative[item.ID] = iteration_negative_3Index }
    range_negative_4 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["range"] + len(input)
    _ = range_negative_4
    over_negative_5 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_negative["over"] + len(input)
    _ = over_negative_5
    return nil
}
